description: Shared correctness fixtures for the Java and Rust false-sharing variants (docs/benchmark-correctness-fixtures.md). Both languages' correctness tests hard-code exactly these named cases so they assert against one canonical expectation, not two independently invented ones. If you change a value here, change CounterCorrectnessTest.java and the Rust #[test] block in src/lib.rs in the same commit.

cases.name: two-writers-dedicated-counters
cases.notes: contended is Java-only (@Contended); Rust covers shared and padded with this case.
